name: COMSCORE, INC.
summary: PART I Unless the context requires otherwise, references in this 10-K to "Comscore," "we," "us," the "Company" and "our" refer to comScore, Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries. This 10-K contains trademarks and trade names of our company and our subsidiaries. We maintain trademark protection for our products and services.
